title: Ascidieria palawanensis
taxonomy: Ascidieria palawanensis is a species of orchid native to the Philippines, specifically found in Palawan. As a member of the orchid family (Orchidaceae), it is classified as a flowering plant within the kingdom Plantae. Its classification also includes being a part of the subfamily Orchidoideae, which comprises a large and diverse group of orchids. Within this subfamily, it belongs to the tribe Cranichideae, a group of orchids known for their unique flowers and growth habits. At the genus level, Ascidieria palawanensis is classified as Ascidieria, a small genus of orchids that are endemic to the Philippines.
